Web Development Proposal

Vertex PRO
Digital Presence

A comprehensive web design, development, and digital strategy proposal - crafted to elevate Vertex PRO's online identity and showcase large scale projects including construction, civil works, steel structure, supply installations, industrial machinery installations, food industries, HVAC, and interior fitouts.

Prepared by Adaline Basecamp May 2026 v1.0

Project Understanding

What Vertex PRO Needs

Vertex PRO requires a premium digital presence that reflects the quality of their work - from luxury Dior retail fit-outs to large-scale industrial projects. Here's what we'll deliver:

🌐

Professional Website

A modern, responsive landing page that showcases Vertex PRO's portfolio, services, and credibility to potential clients across Saudi Arabia and the GCC.

✍️

Compelling Content

Professionally written copy for every section - hero, about, services, projects, and contact - optimized for both humans and search engines.

📧

Business Email

Professional email setup (e.g., info@vertexpro.sa) for credible client communication and brand consistency.

🚀

Hosting & Deployment

Fast, reliable hosting with SSL, CDN, and optimized performance - ensuring the site loads quickly across all regions.

Design Preview

What The Site Will Look Like

A custom aesthetic crafted specifically from Vertex PRO's existing logo and brand styleguides, reflecting your unique identity. Fully responsive across all devices.

Note: The colors and imagery shown below are placeholders for this proposal. The final website will be fully customized to match your official logo and brand styleguides.
  • ✓Custom design based on your existing logo & brand styleguides
  • ✓Parallax hero with construction imagery
  • ✓Animated statistics counters
  • ✓Horizontal-scroll project gallery
  • ✓Working contact form with validation
  • ✓Mobile-first responsive design
  • ✓SEO optimized with meta tags
  • ✓Fast load times (< 2s)

Scope of Work

What's Included

A complete end-to-end web solution - from design to deployment. No hidden costs.

1 Website Design & Development

Custom-designed, responsive website built with modern web technologies.

  • Custom design tailored to your existing logo and brand styleguides
  • Responsive across all devices (mobile, tablet, desktop)
  • Hero section with parallax scrolling effects
  • About section with animated stat counters
  • Services showcase (6 service categories)
  • Project portfolio (showcasing installations, steel structure, industrial, etc.)
  • Client logo marquee (customer scroll bars)
  • Contact form with direct sales team integration
  • Navigation with smooth scrolling
  • SEO optimization & meta tags

2 Content Creation

Professional copy that speaks to your target audience.

  • Hero headline & subtext
  • About section (company story & mission)
  • 6x service descriptions with features
  • Project descriptions & categorization
  • Contact section copy
  • SEO meta descriptions

3 Hosting & Deployment

Reliable, fast hosting with everything configured.

  • Domain transfer, configuration & DNS setup
  • SSL certificate (HTTPS)
  • CDN for global fast loading
  • Production deployment & optimization
  • Performance monitoring

4 Business Email

Professional email that matches your domain.

  • Custom domain email (e.g., info@vertexpro.sa)
  • Email client setup & configuration
  • Spam protection & security
  • Setup guidance & onboarding

Project Timeline

Estimated Schedule

From kickoff to launch in approximately 10 days.

Day 1

Discovery & Kickoff

Align on brand guidelines, gather final content inputs, confirm project imagery, and finalize sitemap structure.

Days 2-4

Design & Content

Create high-fidelity designs, write all page content, and present for review. Incorporate feedback.

Days 5-7

Development & Integration

Build the responsive site with all interactions, animations, contact form, and SEO implementation.

Days 8-9

Testing & Revisions

Cross-browser & device testing, performance optimization, and implementing revision feedback.

Day 10

Deployment & Handover

Domain setup, hosting configuration, email setup, SSL, and final launch. Handover documentation provided.
